# Vault Lite — Lattice Canonical Glossary
# Liminal Institute | @liminaljermo

> Public access layer for the Lattice framework — a perception generation
> and constraint navigation architecture.

## Core

- README: https://github.com/kushkillerjsixx66/vault-lite/blob/main/README.md
- Glossary: https://github.com/kushkillerjsixx66/vault-lite/blob/main/lattice_canonical_glossary.md
- Live site: https://vaultlite-jet.vercel.app

## Canonical Vault

- Full architecture: https://github.com/kushkillerjsixx66/canonical-vault

## Key Terms

Lattice, IDE, CCE, CFC, Governance Envelope, Lineage Chain, Invariants,
Operator Playbook, AMP, Reversibility Boundary, Module Handoff Contract,
Vara Scan, Vault Chain, Field Constitution, Cognitive Operator, Neurslese,
Stumpy, Bilateral Protocols, Specialization Layer, Drift Detection,
Semantic Anchor, Embedding Cluster, Retrieval Surface
